pageName: TiDB Cloud vs Neon: HTAP Database Comparison

meta.title: TiDB Cloud vs Neon: HTAP Database Comparison
meta.description: Compare TiDB Cloud and Neon. Discover why TiDB offers superior scalability, real-time analytics, and MySQL compatibility for enterprise workloads.

props.headline: TiDB Cloud vs Neon: The HTAP Database Choice
props.subheadline: Compare scalability, cost, and real-time analytics capabilities. Discover why enterprises choose TiDB Cloud for high-performance, horizontally scalable databases.

props.title: Top 3 Reasons to Choose TiDB Over Neon
props.subtitle: Enterprise-grade performance, real-time analytics, and MySQL compatibility built-in.

items.title: Unlimited Horizontal Scalability
items.description: Scale to petabytes of data across distributed clusters with TiDB's proven Raft consensus. Neon is limited to single-node architecture and vertical scaling constraints.

items.title: Native HTAP for Real-Time Analytics
items.description: Run OLTP and OLAP workloads simultaneously on the same data with TiDB's unified architecture. Neon requires separate systems and complex ETL pipelines.

items.title: Full MySQL Compatibility
items.description: Drop-in replacement for MySQL with 99.9% query compatibility. Migrate workloads instantly without code rewrites. Neon requires custom adaptations.

props.title: TiDB Cloud vs Neon: Feature Matrix
props.subtitle: See how TiDB Cloud and Neon stack up on key enterprise database capabilities.

rows.ours: Unlimited — scales to petabytes across distributed clusters
rows.theirs: Limited — single-node architecture with vertical scaling only

rows.ours: Native — unified OLTP + OLAP on same data in real-time
rows.theirs: Not supported — requires separate analytics systems

rows.ours: Fully managed — automatic failover, scaling, backups
rows.theirs: Requires manual tuning and infrastructure management

rows.ours: Pay-as-you-go with volume discounts; predictable scaling
rows.theirs: Compute + storage charges; costs escalate with scale

rows.ours: Multi-region with automatic failover and zero data loss
Strong ACID with Raft consensus and transaction support
rows.theirs: Eventual consistency with potential data anomalies

props.title: Ready to Experience TiDB Cloud?
props.subtitle: Join thousands of enterprises using TiDB Cloud for scalable, real-time analytics. No credit card required.
